title: sorbus aucuparia var. typica
intro: Sorbus aucuparia var. typica, also known as the mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae), characterized by its clusters of white flowers and red berries. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sorbus aucuparia var. typica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, flu, and gastrointestinal disorders.
